'''βàöl-dh-b-s''' ('''kaladhbesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moer|moer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moer|moer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöl-dh-b-s
|-
! Lemma
| kaladhbesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladhbesoko|thiladhbesoko]] || [[word:jiladhbesoko|jiladhbesoko]] || [[word:shiladhbesoko|shiladhbesoko]] || [[word:kiladhbesoko|kiladhbesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladhbesoko|thuthuladhbesoko]] || [[word:jujuladhbesoko|jujuladhbesoko]] || [[word:shushuladhbesoko|shushuladhbesoko]] || [[word:kukuladhbesoko|kukuladhbesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholadhbesoko|tholadhbesoko]] || [[word:joladhbesoko|joladhbesoko]] || [[word:sholadhbesoko|sholadhbesoko]] || [[word:koladhbesoko|koladhbesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠladhbesoko|thΟΠladhbesoko]] || [[word:jΟΠladhbesoko|jΟΠladhbesoko]] || [[word:shΟΠladhbesoko|shΟΠladhbesoko]] || [[word:kΟΠladhbesoko|kΟΠladhbesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaladhbesoko|thaladhbesoko]] || [[word:jaladhbesoko|jaladhbesoko]] || [[word:shaladhbesoko|shaladhbesoko]] || [[word:kaladhbesoko|kaladhbesoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
